title: Kofi Meets the Safari Friends
synopsis: Little Kofi explores the warm savanna and meets friendly animals including a gentle elephant, a tall giraffe, and a striped zebra. Each animal greets Kofi with their special sound in this simple introduction to safari wildlife.

pages.text: Kofi walks in the warm grass. The sun is bright and golden.

illustration.description: A young boy named Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes walking through tall golden savanna grass under a bright sun, painted in gouache with thick brushstrokes and warm colors
illustration.alt: Kofi walking through golden savanna grass

pages.text: Look! A big elephant says hello. 'Trumpet, trumpet!' goes the elephant.

illustration.description: A large gray elephant with expressive painted features greeting Kofi who has short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes, painted in gouache style with thick brushstrokes and warm savanna colors

pages.text: A tall giraffe bends down. 'Hello, Kofi!' The giraffe has long spots.

illustration.description: A tall spotted giraffe bending its long neck down toward Kofi who has short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes, painted with bold gouache brushstrokes in warm orange sunset colors
illustration.alt: Spotted giraffe bending down to meet Kofi

pages.text: A zebra runs by. Black and white stripes! 'Neigh, neigh!' says the zebra.

illustration.description: A zebra with bold black and white stripes running past Kofi who has short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes, painted in textured gouache style with confident brushstrokes and golden grass background

pages.text: Kofi waves goodbye to all his new animal friends. What a happy day!

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes waving goodbye to the elephant, giraffe, and zebra under an orange sunset sky, painted in warm gouache colors with thick expressive brushstrokes
illustration.alt: Kofi waving goodbye to all the safari animals

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: What sound does the elephant make?
questions.explanation: Elephants make trumpet sounds with their trunks!

questions.question: What colors are the zebra's stripes?
questions.explanation: Zebras have black and white stripes all over their bodies!

questions.question: Which animal is the tallest?
questions.explanation: Giraffes are the tallest animals with their long necks!
